candidate.title: Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150 accelerator catalog field promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local captures found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-iluvatar-tg100/20260628T060648884971Z-www-iluvatar-com-productdetails-8c03246db5.md and raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-iluvatar-tg150/20260628T060649205621Z-www-iluvatar-com-productdetails-c8a0efc7a3.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated comparison text mentioned Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150 as raw comparison evidence, but no iluvatar-tiangai-100 or iluvatar-tiangai-150 SKU, observation, or resolved-spec rows existed before this parent task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, and AI Infra Coverage Map; no dedicated Iluvatar Tiangai page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior continuation parent-1 through parent-10 manifests cover Corigine, SGLang, Yusur, NVIDIA H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda, Resnics N2025, NVIDIA confidential inference, Asterfusion, and Kunlunxin R200. This task does not repeat those rows and promotes only the Iluvatar Tiangai source-visible product-spec slice.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: Hardware layer previously listed Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150 as raw comparison evidence only. Parent-11 records a narrower boundary where TG100 exposes physical, memory, host-interface, inter-chip-bandwidth, and power fields, while TG150 exposes only memory and board power.
Added one known_source entry for parent-11 Iluvatar Tiangai fields without mutating blocked_items or unrelated coverage gaps.
No pre-existing iluvatar-tiangai-100 or iluvatar-tiangai-150 SKU rows; added one SKU per product page.

No pre-existing Tiangai observations; added TG100 observations for form_factor, memory_capacity, memory_type, host_interface, interconnect, and tdp, and TG150 observations for memory_capacity, memory_type, and tdp.
No pre-existing Tiangai resolved fields; added resolved fields pointing to new Tiangai observations only.
Existing iluvatar-tg100-product-page and iluvatar-tg150-product-page source registry entries were reused; the source registry was not modified because it already contained the needed source IDs.

Existing raw comparison rows now include resolved-spec citations and explicit caveats for unsupported compute, memory-bandwidth, benchmark, ecosystem, production-operation, and TG150 interface/form-factor claims.
Catalog coverage text now treats TG100 and TG150 as bounded structured product rows and keeps unsupported qualitative, benchmark, throughput, and production-operation claims outside resolved fields.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained official product-specific Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150 captures with source-visible, schema-supported fields that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

schema_boundary.source_value: TG100 product page states a shared 64 GB/s host bidirectional bandwidth.
schema_boundary.boundary: Kept as raw comparison evidence because the catalog has no host-bandwidth field and the planner forbids host bandwidth normalization.

schema_boundary.source_value: TG100 product page states a shared 64 GB/s inter-chip bandwidth.
schema_boundary.boundary: Recorded only as a bounded interconnect string because spec-fields.yaml supports an interconnect field; no named fabric, topology, or aggregate system behavior is inferred.

schema_boundary.source_value: TG100 and TG150 pages include qualitative compatibility, migration, model coverage, and performance-parity language.
schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted as benchmark, ecosystem-completion, production-operation, service-SLO, training-throughput, inference-throughput, or product-ranking evidence.

schema_boundary.source_value: TG150 page states 64 GB HBM memory and 350 W board power but does not expose a TG150 form-factor table, host-interface value, exact compute peaks, or memory bandwidth.
schema_boundary.boundary: TG150 resolved fields are limited to memory_capacity, memory_type, and tdp.

schema_boundary.source_value: Iluvatar Zhikai 50, Zhikai 100, other Iluvatar families, Metax, Huawei, Enflame, and unrelated accelerators appear in navigation or adjacent comparison evidence.
schema_boundary.boundary: No non-Tiangai SKU, observation, or resolved row is created or modified by parent-11.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Iluvatar Zhikai 50, Zhikai 100, other Iluvatar family, Metax, Huawei, Enflame, or unrelated accelerator row was promoted by this task.

No exact compute peak, memory-bandwidth, host-bandwidth, benchmark ranking, benchmark parity, model-count performance, ecosystem compatibility, production incident/postmortem, service SLO, training throughput, inference throughput, local benchmark baseline, MLCommons submission, legal-compliance completion, or aggregate-system claim was promoted from the Tiangai pages.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
Existing H200, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, Biren, Corigine, Resnics, Yusur, and Asterfusion resolved fields were not intentionally changed.
